title: Strangers

credits.source: Storyteller Toolbox legacy solo tools (community expansions)

entries: Scared, lacking in confidence but keen to prove themselves
Arrogant and overconfident, but tough and reliable
Daft, a joker and maybe a little cowardly but a good friend
Tough, stoic, won’t tell you about a wound until after the battle.
Cute, small, a great companion but useless in a fight
Big, burly and battle scarred
Intelligent, strategic, not tough, but extremely clever
Agile, swift and extremely powerful, an experienced fighter
Shrewd, quiet and brooding, a great thief or spy
Elegant, gorgeous and sophisticated, and knows how to handle a sword
Wise, old and experienced, has seen a lot of the world
High-born, posh and wealthy, but keen to leave it all behind
An eccentric inventor with wild ideas and a knack for creating unusual gadgets.
A skilled medic with a deep knowledge of herbs and remedies, always ready to tend to wounds.
A seasoned explorer who has ventured into the most treacherous parts of the Tundroom.
A mysterious seer with the ability to glimpse into the future through cryptic visions.
A charismatic bard who can weave captivating tales and inspire those around them.
A reclusive hermit who has lived in isolation, harboring ancient knowledge of the Tundroom.
A skilled blacksmith with the ability to forge powerful weapons and armor.
A gifted artist who captures the beauty of the frozen landscape through their creations.
A master of ice magic, capable of controlling and manipulating the frosty elements.
A wise elder who serves as the village's spiritual guide and keeper of traditions.
A skilled negotiator and diplomat, adept at resolving conflicts and forging alliances.
A fierce warrior with unmatched combat skills, feared by enemies and respected by allies.
A playful and mischievous trickster, always up to some clever pranks.
A weathered sailor with a deep understanding of navigating the treacherous Ice Sea.
A dedicated farmer who manages to cultivate crops in the harsh tundra climate.
A resourceful hunter and tracker, able to find prey even in the most barren landscapes.
A compassionate caregiver who looks after the young, the elderly, and the injured.
A seasoned storyteller who preserves the oral history and legends of the village.
A skilled ice sculptor, turning blocks of ice into breathtaking works of art.
A charismatic leader who unites the villagers and guides them through challenging times.
A curious scholar with an insatiable thirst for knowledge about the Tundroom's secrets.
A skilled trapper, providing the village with valuable furs and pelts for warmth and trade.
A talented musician who plays haunting melodies on an ancient, ice-carved instrument.
A daring acrobat who entertains the village with gravity-defying performances.
A wise herbalist with knowledge of rare plants that possess unique properties.
An expert ice fisherman, able to catch the most elusive and delicious fish beneath the frozen surface.
A caring teacher who imparts essential skills and knowledge to the village youth.
A devoted guardian of sacred rituals and customs, ensuring they are passed down through generations.
A skilled sled racer, competing in thrilling races across the icy plains.
A master of camouflage and stealth, using the snowy landscape to their advantage.
A skilled ice skater, gliding gracefully on frozen lakes and putting on captivating shows.
A lively festival organizer, bringing joy and celebration to the village with elaborate events.
A weathered traveler who has visited distant lands and shares fascinating tales of other regions.
A daring ice climber, ascending frozen cliffs to retrieve valuable resources.
An expert fire-maker, ensuring the village has warmth and comfort even in the coldest nights.
A spiritual healer, using ancient rituals to restore balance and harmony within the community.
A skilled engineer, creating ingenious devices to make life easier in the harsh climate.
A master of sled dogs, training and leading teams on essential journeys through the tundra.
An ice sculpting apprentice, eager to learn the artistry of the village's esteemed sculptor.
A guardian of ancient relics and artifacts, protecting the village's cultural heritage.
An expert ice breaker, ensuring the village's access to crucial water sources remains open.
A talented seamstress, creating intricate and warm clothing to withstand the cold.
